caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, large black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "I ONLY NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing displays. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. To his right, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt and green pants. In the background, various framed pictures hang on the wall, and a clothing rack is visible. On the bottom left of the screen, a circular logo contains the word "THE", and on the bottom right, red text reads "REALLY FELT THAT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, smiling and laughing while looking slightly off-camera to his right, with subtle shifts in his facial expression and posture.
